overall.description: A slow first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk street food stall at night, featuring a vendor cooking noodles in a wok surrounded by neon lighting and Japanese-inspired decor. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases detailed ray-traced lighting, atmospheric steam effects, and the vendor's cooking animations as the camera approaches and observes the cooking process.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street food stall entrance with storage boxes

events.description: camera enters the food stall area from the left side, passing cardboard boxes

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward into the food stall, approaching the cooking station

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the cooking station, preparing ingredients calmly

entered.detail: stacked delivery boxes with orange branding in the foreground
large industrial cooking pot on the left side counter
white metal preparation table with various kitchen items
active cooking station with wok and rising steam
metal ventilation hood above the cooking area
dark wooden cabinetry on the right wall with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow cyberpunk food stall from the left, passing white cardboard boxes and a large metal pot. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting, revealing a cooking counter and wok station ahead where a vendor stands working. Dark wood cabinetry lines the right wall as the camera slowly advances toward the cooking area.

scene_state.functional_zone: active cooking station with neon decorations

events.description: steam rising from the wok becomes more prominent as camera approaches the heat source

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while observing the vendor's cooking process

notable_agents.action: vendor stirring contents of the wok with a spatula, steam rising around them

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red lanterns with black characters hanging above the cooking station
illuminated blue digital display showing menu items behind the vendor
large mound of cooked noodles on a tray next to the wok
large red wall hanging with black Japanese character symbol behind the vendor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the stall, the camera passes the initial storage area and approaches the active cooking station. Red paper lanterns hang above while the vendor stirs the wok, steam rising visibly. A digital menu screen glows blue behind the vendor, and a pile of noodles sits ready on the right counter. The cardboard boxes and metal pot from the entrance are now behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: intense cooking action at the wok station

events.description: vendor tosses noodles vigorously in the wok, flipping them with expert motion
vendor adds seasoning to the wok and tastes the food with a utensil

agents.ego_description: standing still at the counter watching the vendor's skilled cooking techniques

notable_agents.action: vendor actively tossing noodles in the wok, then seasoning and tasting the food

entered.detail: metal rack with cooking supplies and containers behind the vendor

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the counter to observe the vendor's expert cooking. The vendor tosses noodles vigorously in the steaming wok, then adds seasoning and tastes the dish. Red lanterns glow above the station, and the digital menu screen flickers in the background. The cooking action is the focal point as steam fills the air around the wok station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim entrance of a cyberpunk food stall into the vibrant, steam-filled heart of a cooking station. It begins by gliding past white cardboard boxes and a large metal pot, moving through a narrow space lined with dark wood cabinetry toward a distant vendor. As the camera advances deeper into the stall, the lighting shifts from dim artificial tones to the warm glow of red paper lanterns and the blue flicker of a digital menu screen. The scene then opens up to the active cooking area, where the camera comes to a halt to observe the vendor vigorously tossing noodles in a steaming wok. Finally, the focus settles on the detailed process of seasoning and tasting the dish as thick clouds of steam fill the air around the station.
